team.date_founded: Founded on Orcus, the so-called anti-Pluto, by settlers who embraced the world's underworld mythology.
team.number_of_fans: Around 5 million who revel in the club's dark mystique.
team.badge: A black gate ajar over an underworld river, a single coin glinting.
team.home_kit: Funereal black and deep green with an underworld-gate motif.
team.third_kit: Obsidian with a faint river-of-souls line.
team.history: Orcus Athletic are the Kuiper's dark horses — a direct, defensively stubborn side who lurk in the gloom and strike from set pieces. Quiet, ominous, and dangerous, they specialise in stealing matches no one expected them to win.
team.club_culture: Brooding, stubborn, and quietly dangerous. The Shades thrive on being underestimated.
trophy_cabinet: A reputation for stealing results from set pieces
legends: Charon Vex — the dead-ball specialist whose free-kicks were the stuff of legend
achievements: Most set-piece goals in the Kuiper

stadium.date_built: A frontier ground carved into a shadowed Orcian basin.
stadium.sponsors: Backed by the colony's mining and ritual guilds.
stadium.pitch_size: Compact, suited to the deep, direct block.
stadium.bio: The Pit is a dim, brooding basin where the home crowd falls eerily silent before every set piece — and erupts when the Shades steal another goal from the gloom.

training_facility.date_built: A basic facility in the shadowed basin.
training_facility.sponsors: Funded modestly by the Orcian guilds.
training_facility.bio: The Pit Training Complex drills defensive resilience and set-piece precision, the two pillars of the Shades' dark, direct game.

manager.appearance: Solemn and still, watches from the shadows of the technical area.
manager.bio: Abyss Ivanova is a direct, defensive pragmatist who turns the Shades into a side nobody wants to draw. She sits deep, goes long, and wins ugly through set pieces and stubbornness.
manager.playing_history: A defensive stalwart at small Kuiper clubs.
manager.playing_philosophy: Defend, go direct, and steal it from a dead ball. Beauty is optional; points are not.
manager.culture: A pragmatist who relishes the dark arts.
achievements: Built the Kuiper's best set-piece record

managing_staff.appearance: Quiet and exacting, drills the block until it is impenetrable.
managing_staff.bio: Shade Petrova perfects the defensive resilience that lets the Shades frustrate and then strike, the architect of their stubbornness.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: Concede nothing, and the set piece will win it.

players.appearance: Solid and calm, master of the dim box.
players.bio: Shade Reyes is the balanced keeper who anchors the Shades' stubborn block.
achievements: Most clean sheets in the side

players.appearance: Tireless and rugged, grafts the flank.
players.bio: Specter Torres is the workhorse full-back who covers the channel without rest.
achievements: Most distance covered by a defender

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the heart of the block.
players.bio: Shadow Okafor is the team-first defender who keeps the Shades' shape immovable.

players.appearance: Combative and hard, the aerial threat.
players.bio: Wraith Kane is the aggressive defender who is also a menace at attacking set pieces.
achievements: Most set-piece goals by a defender

players.bio: Phantom Rivera is the composed defender who snuffs out danger in the gloom.

players.appearance: Inventive and precise, the dead-ball artist.
players.bio: Void Kim is the creative spark and free-kick specialist who wins the Shades their stolen goals.
achievements: Most direct free-kick goals in the Kuiper

players.appearance: Willing and selfless, the midfield shield.
players.bio: Abyss Mori is the team-first midfielder who screens the block tirelessly.

players.appearance: Balanced and steady, keeps the direct game honest.
players.bio: Dark Nakamura is the composed midfielder who keeps the long game from becoming aimless.
achievements: Highest pass completion in the side

players.appearance: Lean and predatory, the lurking finisher.
players.bio: Ghost Yamamoto is the selfish striker who appears from the shadows to convert set pieces and scraps.

players.appearance: Direct and combative, the target man.
players.bio: Nether Patel is the aggressive forward who wins the long balls and the set-piece duels.
achievements: Most aerial duels won by a forward

players.appearance: Self-assured and sharp, the wide threat.
players.bio: Dusk Novak is the selfish wide forward who delivers the set pieces and finishes the rare counter.

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Umbra Torres is the cautious veteran second keeper, dependable when called.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Eclipse Anderson is the team-first deputy who keeps the block intact in rotation.

players.appearance: Young and balanced, an academy defender on the rise.
players.bio: Penumbra Martinez is the promising young defender learning the Shades' dark discipline.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Occult Chandra is the creative deputy and a promising dead-ball talent from the bench.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with a selfish edge.
players.bio: Obscure Ito is the eager young finisher pushing for a place among the Shades.
